availability_zone.description: The specific availability zone where the EC2 capacity block is offered.

capacity_block_offering_id.description: The unique identifier for the EC2 capacity block offering.

currency_code.description: The currency code in which the pricing for the capacity block is defined.

end_date_range.description: The end date until which the capacity block offering is valid.

start_date_range.description: The start date from which the capacity block offering becomes valid.

tenancy.description: The type of tenancy for the EC2 instances (e.g., default, dedicated) in the capacity block.

upfront_fee.description: The upfront fee required for acquiring the EC2 capacity block.
